title: Tumbleweed
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/msatPZQ2/images/5d819bb9727babb1cf6001e8c80863540b9136e6.png)

Tumbleweeds spawn around dead bushes in deserts and drop random goodies upon harvesting.

[Drops](https://github.com/konwboj/Tumbleweed/wiki/Drops) (this and other options customizable through data packs and config)
